utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey ! Oh listen , I was just clearing some space for your stuff .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I was just clearing some space for your stuff .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh thanks , but listen , I was just at Monica and she and Chandler had a big fight and they are not moving in .

emotion_cause.span: 2_she and Chandler had a big fight and they are not moving in .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What do you mean , they are not moving in ? They ... they are still moving in right ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ... no , they just had a big blowout over what to do with my room .

emotion_cause.span: 4_they just had a big blowout over what to do with my room .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , I feel kinda bad for them , but I am also really psyched cause I do not have to move in here !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh no , yeah no , that part great !
